ddls:
CREATE TABLE "books" (
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each book */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the book */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the author of the book */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the book */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the book was published */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genre of the book */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the publisher of the book */,
  "isbn" TEXT /* ISBN number of the book */,
  "cover_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the book's cover image */,
  "book_description" TEXT /* Description of the book */,
  "total_pages" INTEGER /* Total number of pages in the book */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the language of the book */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_publisher_id FOREIGN KEY ("publisher_id") REFERENCES publishers ("publisher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES languages ("language_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the author */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the author */,
  "date_of_death" TEXT /* Date of death of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "genre_description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publishers" (
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publisher */,
  "publisher_name" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the publisher */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the publisher is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the publisher is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the publisher is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user's account */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who left the review */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating given by the user */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the user's review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was posted */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review helpful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_ratings" (
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book */,
  "average_rating" TEXT /* Average rating of the book */,
  "total_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews for the book */,
  "total_ratings" INTEGER /* Total number of ratings for the book */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_book_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book */,
  "read_date" TEXT /* Date the book was read */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating given by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_book_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_book_history_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommended_books" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended book */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date the book was recommended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommended_books_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommended_books_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)
